summary: Frontend-only e2e test of static React art site 'Cortona Francesca'. Tested Home, Navbar Opere dropdown, /arcani (title/subtitle/prices/gallery + lightbox open/next/prev/close), /opere (select trigger+list, 6 serie cards), all 6 collection pages (/opere/<slug>), /contatti social links, and footer social links. All required data-testids present, all images load (naturalWidth>0) across Home (5), Arcani (22), and every collection page (frammenti 12, innocence-1 18, innocence-2 27, innocence-3 11, maestri-di-marmo 4, dopo-di-noi 9). Lightbox opens on click, prev/next/close and Escape all work. Social hrefs correct in both contatti and footer with target=_blank. No console/page errors observed.
critical_code_review_comments: Footer social <a> tags do not include target=_blank / rel=noopener (contatti links do). Minor UX/security nit—consider adding for consistency.
content.json-driven; consider adding alt text i18n fallback per image (currently descriptive but generic).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Static React SPA, no backend. All key data-testids implemented: nav-opere, opere-dropdown, dropdown-<slug>, arcani-gallery, arcani-gallery-item-N, lightbox + lightbox-next/prev/close, opere-select-trigger, opere-select-list, serie-card-<slug>, serie-description, serie-gallery, serie-gallery-item-N, contact-facebook/instagram/whatsapp/email, footer-facebook/instagram. Images served from /media/opere/<slug>/N.jpg and /media/arcani/arcano-N.jpg — all load. Facebook URL: facebook.com/CortonaFrancescaArcani; Instagram: instagram.com/francescacortona.
